posts.name: Acti

posts.description: Type what you need. Hold Acti Bar. Acti understands your intent and brings back the right result, link, or action - right where you are. Use Acti for live sports schedules, nearby restaurants, Notion docs, LinkedIn profiles, Meet links, Calendar actions, and custom workflows - without leaving the conversation.

posts.name: Humalike
posts.tagline: Give your AI agents the social intelligence they're missing
posts.description: Today's models are capable enough. Smart enough. Fast enough. But we still feel they don’t fit in the room. Humalike is building the behavioral infrastructure for humanlike AI agents. The social skills & proactiveness your agents have been missing. APIs, models, benchmarks.

posts.name: Tabstack Browser Automation
posts.tagline: Automate the web in your app or agent, no browser to host
posts.description: Give /automate a task in plain English and it drives a real browser to do it: navigate a site, click through a multi-step flow, fill a form, reach a page that only renders after interaction. The result streams back in one API call. It's an API you call, not a framework you install. Browser and LLM included, nothing to host, no concurrency ceiling. Accessibility-tree automation spends 60 to 80% fewer tokens than screenshot-based agents. Built by Mozilla. Ephemeral, no training on your data.

posts.name: Claude Sonnet 5

makers.name: Logan Kilpatrick

posts.tagline: Your research partner for rigorous science
posts.description: Claude Science is your AI workbench for scientific research. Works through your research like a skilled scientist, running the analysis and tracing every step. Spend less time stitching pipelines together, and more time on the science.

posts.name: OASIS 1 Ring
posts.tagline: Whisper to write and touch to edit
posts.description: OASIS Ring combines our patented ring trackpad with private voice capture, integrated with Wispr Flow. posts.name: RunInfra
posts.tagline: Describe the AI model you need and get an optimized AI
posts.description: Tell RunInfra what you need and it builds the production API. No dashboards. No config. Describe any open source model or full app in plain language. Build voice (speech → AI → speech), doc search, vision, or model routing, all in one chat. Pay per million tokens. Scale to zero. Run managed or on your own GPUs.

posts.name: N71
posts.tagline: Give all your AI agents one shared context
posts.description: For knowledge workers orchestrating a dozen AI agents. 🧠 Your context never sits still: decisions shift, deals move, priorities change by the hour. Yet every new chat starts blank, and no agent knows what the others already worked out. N71 gives them one shared context that stays current, connect your tools and it maintains a living knowledge graph they read from over MCP, updated the moment anything changes. Ask any agent anything, and it's already caught up. 🔗

posts.name: Stigg 2.0
posts.tagline: The usage runtime for AI products
posts.description: Stigg is the usage runtime for AI products: the real-time enforcement and governance layer between your app and your billing stack. It decides what every customer, user, team, and agent can do, the moment they try. Millisecond credit checks, zero overdraft, enterprise governance, and modular BYOC. Metering, credits, entitlements, and governance in one runtime. Enforce in the request path instead of reconciling on the invoice. Free forever for AI startups.

posts.name: Metal
posts.tagline: AI-driven operating system for raising venture rounds
posts.description: Backed by a16z and YC, Metal offers an AI-native operating system for founders raising venture rounds. The platform is already being actively used by hundreds of high-intent founders backed by a16z, YC, Techstars and other top-tier investors.

posts.name: Browser Notes
posts.tagline: Your ideas, organized - not uploaded
posts.description: Notes are often scattered across writing apps, sticky boards, and mind-mapping tools, while your private ideas are pushed to the cloud. Browser Notes brings notes, sticky notes, and mind maps into one local-first workspace. No account, no tracking, and no forced sync. It works offline, stores everything in your browser, and lets you back up your data anytime.

posts.name: Loot
posts.tagline: Collect your favorite things in real life
posts.description: Collect your favorite things in real life. Point your camera and tap the shutter — Loot recognizes it, cuts it out, and sorts it into the right collection. Then share with friends.

posts.name: Folderly Lens
posts.tagline: Domain health analysis for high performance email campaigns
posts.description: Most people are running email campaigns with damaged domains and they don't know it. Now you can find out quickly and easily. Folderly Lens checks public DNS, authentication, MX, IP rDNS, and blacklist signals, then returns a KILL / REHAB / KEEP verdict with a copyable fix plan. No signup, no mailbox access, no test sends.

posts.name: Dump Memory
posts.tagline: We fix your memory
posts.description: Dump is your private second brain. Capture notes, photos, voice memos, documents, screenshots, and X bookmarks in one place. No folders, tags, or filing. Dump enriches information with web context and lets you find anything using on-device semantic search. Everything stays on your device and personal iCloud with zero cloud storage, zero tracking, and zero compromise. Just dump, remember, and instantly recall what matters.

posts.name: Folderly Lens
posts.tagline: Domain health analysis for high performance email campaigns
posts.description: Most people are running email campaigns with damaged domains and they don't know it. Now you can find out quickly and easily. posts.name: Clusy
posts.tagline: AI notebook platform for modern data science
posts.description: Clusy is an agent-native notebook platform for researchers and data teams to build, branch, run, and evaluate ML and data science workflows in the cloud. Describe a goal in natural language, and Clusy plans the workflow, sources datasets, preprocesses data, runs parallel experiments in replicated kernels, compares model architectures, and helps produce optimal models through a human-in-the-loop notebook experience.

posts.name: Bamboo
posts.tagline: Markdown notes with AI under your control
posts.description: Bamboo is a Markdown-first notes app for people who want a simple, portable workspace for ideas, documents, tasks, research, and personal knowledge. It combines a focused editor, collections, wiki links, web clipping, import/export, backups, and cross-device sync across iPhone, iPad, and Mac. AI is optional and controlled by you: connect supported providers, choose your model, and draft, rewrite, summarize, or brainstorm inside your notes.

posts.name: Aruki
posts.tagline: The Japanese walking method, coached on your iPhone
posts.description: Aruki coaches the Japanese walking method — three minutes easy, three minutes brisk, repeated — entirely from your iPhone. A soft chime and a quiet voice cue every switch, and a Live Activity shows the phase on your lock screen, so your phone stays in your pocket. No Apple Watch, no account, no backend, no subscription — just a one-time Pro unlock. The full guided walk is free.

posts.name: Ciaro Pro
posts.tagline: AI filmmaking for visual storytellers
posts.description: AI video tools are great at making clips. Ciaro Pro is built for visual storytellers who want to shape complete ideas into coherent AI-powered films. Develop the story, look, characters, references, storyboards, images, and videos in one creative workflow — without losing control of the film you set out to make.

posts.name: Get Transparent Pricing on Labs
posts.tagline: The right tests. The real price. Nothing extra.
posts.description: Everyone sells you a bundle... 100 biomarkers and tests, one price, most you'll never use. We unbundle it. Answer a 60-second questionnaire and see exactly which tests answer your question, which to skip, and what each costs. Buy those. Skip the rest. Simple and transparent.

posts.name: Saldor

It feels fast, visual, and native — closer to a built-in macOS interaction than a traditional window manager. Wins 4.3 is designed for people who live in multiple windows every day and want their Mac workspace to feel cleaner, faster, and more organized.

posts.name: NativeProse
posts.tagline: Rewrite your English to sound native, not just correct
posts.description: Most non-native speakers write English that's grammatically correct but sounds unnatural to native ears. Grammarly won't fix that. No account needed.

posts.name: Spear

Instead of giving generic reassurance, it helps you notice recurring loops, blind spots, and changes in how you think. Built for people who want clarity, not just someone to listen.

Maker is their canvas: your whole project is live and clickable on one infinite canvas, you point at what's wrong and it edits real code instead of a mockup, and it runs your dev server and maps every route automatically. posts.name: Vector Pixel Art

Your components, design system, design assets: all stranded. Aseprite can't import them. You either trace every node by hand for days, or start over in a new tool. Figma has no answer. It is built for smooth edges, not pixel grid boundaries. Or is it? Vector Pixel Art changes this. Design as usual. Choose Grid Size. Convert. Pixel art in seconds.

posts.name: Veevi — Invoice from WhatsApp in Seconds
posts.tagline: Clients are already on WhatsApp. Your invoices should be too
posts.description: Speak it. Send it. Get paid. Veevi turns a voice note into a Stripe or PayPal payment link in under 10 seconds — no app, no dashboard, just WhatsApp.

makers.name: Akshit Arora
makers.headline: Building boring AI tools for business!

posts.name: Claude Science
posts.tagline: Your research partner for rigorous science
posts.description: Claude Science is your AI workbench for scientific research. Works through your research like a skilled scientist, running the analysis and tracing every step. Spend less time stitching pipelines together, and more time on the science.

posts.name: Stewie Reflect
posts.tagline: The owner's manual your vibe-coded codebase never came with
posts.description: Stewie Reflect reads a read-only snapshot of your GitHub repo and generates an Owner's Manual for the product inside it: what the code does, where the evidence ends, and which decisions only you can make. Every claim is tied back to the file or function that supports it, with plain-language diagrams so the manual is readable, not just technical. Pick a repo and branch to get a free preview — a full chapter plus a map — then unlock the full manual and Markdown export for a $19 beta price.

posts.name: Corgi Daily
posts.tagline: Daily wisdom for people who don't have time to read
posts.description: You're trying to grow. You're busy. And the books you bought with the best intentions are sitting on your nightstand, unread. Corgi Daily reads 10,000+ non-fiction books for you and delivers the one insight that matters — every morning, matched to what you're actually working on. Pick your focus areas in onboarding — building habits, quitting smoking, managing anxiety, sharper thinking, daily affirmations, discipline, financial wisdom and more. Corgi matches every daily insight to your goals.

posts.name: Quantive
posts.tagline: Replace your net worth spreadsheet, no bank logins.
posts.description: Quantive replaces the net worth spreadsheet for people who track finances manually across accounts and currencies. No bank connection: you upload an Excel spreadsheet or enter balances, and get allocation charts, forecasting, and multiple currencies with historically correct FX rates. The privacy is the differentiator: your portfolio is encrypted in your browser before anything reaches the server, which stores only ciphertext. Crypto module open source; the encryption design doc is public.

posts.name: Scrip
posts.tagline: Shared memories in 30 characters, no photos
posts.description: We believe any memory can be brought back in 30 characters. On a trip or at an event, some moments never make it onto camera. The jokes. The fail that became the best part. Scrip keeps them not in photos, but in a few words. A prompt isn't the memory, it's the key that unlocks it. "Rental car check engine light" brings the whole day back. Deliberately short. Shareable with the people who were there. Works offline. Resurfaces months later. Private, no ads, free. A few words. A whole memory.

makers.name: Pascal Keane
makers.headline: Founder of Scrip, a text-only memory app

posts.name: RunRaja
posts.tagline: Trail race management from registration to results
posts.description: RunRaja helps trail race organizers manage events, registrations, payments, teams, race-day timing, live GPS tracking, public results, rankings, and analytics. Runners can discover races, register, track adventures, and share finish stories.

posts.name: GPTypo
posts.tagline: A false positive shield for human writers
posts.description: AI detectors flag real human writing as AI more often than they should. GPTypo scans your text for the patterns they look for, shows which sentences trip them, and helps you fix each in your voice. On the web or the new Chrome extension.

posts.name: Zest — Cookie Consent
posts.tagline: The CMP that doesn't need your credit card.
posts.description: Zest is the CMP that doesn’t need your credit card. No subscription. No account. No dashboard. You own the MIT-licensed code and run it from your own domain. Consent stays in the browser — not on someone else’s server. ~9KB, zero dependencies. Real GDPR, CCPA and Google Consent Mode v2 support. Install in one line. Hate it? Just delete the script.

posts.name: BrieflyAI
posts.tagline: Turn any YouTube video into structured notes
posts.description: Most AI tools that summarize YouTube videos fail the moment there are no subtitles or transcripts. BrieflyAI works for both. Paste any YouTube URL and get: Summary Key Insights Structured Notes Timestamps Built by a solo AI Architect. Deployed and working.`

makers.name: layan khalil Ibrahim
makers.headline: Building AI that solves real problems.

posts.name: Shre
posts.tagline: Instagram DMs, replies and sales, on autopilot
posts.description: Auto-reply to Instagram comments and story replies with DMs, build your link-in-bio, and sell digital products, courses, and bookings, all in one place.

posts.name: PageVera
posts.tagline: Turn any URL into 4 conversion-optimized landing pages
posts.description: PageVera analyzes your existing website and generates four conversion-focused landing page directions with rewritten copy, stronger structure, instant previews, and React + Tailwind export. No blank prompt, no subscription, no waiting weeks for a redesign concept.

makers.name: Ogulcan
makers.headline: I build businesses, not just apps.

posts.name: Zest — Cookie Consent
posts.tagline: The CMP that doesn't need your credit card.
posts.description: Zest is the CMP that doesn’t need your credit card. No subscription. No account. No dashboard. You own the MIT-licensed code and run it from your own domain. Consent stays in the browser — not on someone else’s server. ~9KB, zero dependencies. Real GDPR, CCPA and Google Consent Mode v2 support. Install in one line. Hate it? Just delete the script.

posts.name: MyMagicTrip
posts.tagline: Free Walt Disney World trip planner — no paywall, no ads
posts.description: A 6-question wizard builds your day-by-day Walt Disney World itinerary - with live ride wait times, an honest per-park crowd calendar, and accessibility + dietary filters. 100% free: no subscription, no ads. Built solo because the good Disney planners are all paywalled. iPhone.

posts.name: VIDI
posts.tagline: Spot contract risks before you sign
posts.description: VIDI helps small businesses understand contract risks before signing. Upload a contract and get plain English explanations.

posts.name: DevOps Agent
posts.tagline: Server and project management made easy for developers.
posts.description: DevOps Agent is a single self-hosted binary that gives you a browser-based, macOS-style desktop for managing your Linux server — Docker, NGINX, files, terminal, deployments, and an AI assistant. No SSH required.

posts.name: Cogni — Your Thinking Companion
posts.tagline: Don't let AI think for you.
posts.description: Cogni is a browser extension that sits on top of ChatGPT and Claude and intercepts a prompt before it sends, if it looks like you're handing real thinking to the model. A short reflection question appears first. Your take, in your own words. Then the AI answers, and you've got something of your own to weigh it against. Made for people whose work is supposed to sound like them, not like everyone else's ChatGPT output. Quiet by default, never gamified, and it stays out of your way on lookups.

makers.name: Shivansh Chawla
makers.headline: Building to save you from AI dependency

posts.name: CuocoMitra
posts.tagline: AI Powered Cooking & Fitness copilot
posts.description: Log meals by photo, barcode, Siri voice, or tap. Sync Apple Health and Google Health Connect. Generate a 7-day macro-balanced plan in 30 seconds. Then let an AI sous chef adapt every recipe to your skill, diet, and time. 7,000+ recipes with USDA-grade macros.

posts.name: Raza Photos
posts.tagline: Your photos when you need them. No clouds, no subscriptions.
posts.description: Browse your Mac photo library on any iPhone, iPad, or Mac in your home. No cloud, no subscriptions, no setup. Just your photos, wherever you are. Supports Live Photos, bursts, HDR, and video. Connect multiple Macs and browse them as one unified library, with no duplicate filters. Lock any source read-only so nothing gets accidentally deleted.

makers.name: Radu Zaharia
makers.headline: Still planning that trip to the Moon.

posts.name: Agent Friendly Code
posts.tagline: Which public repos are friendliest to an AI coding agent?
posts.description: Public leaderboard ranking GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket repos by how agent-friendly they are for Claude Code, Cursor, Devin, GPT-5 Codex, Gemini CLI, Aider, OpenHands, and Pi — per model, with AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md, CI, tests, and dev-env signals.

posts.name: Lystn
posts.tagline: Listen to your AI coding assistant — don't read it
posts.description: Lystn speaks your AI coding assistant's replies out loud so you can pace, refill coffee, or watch another monitor and still follow exactly what Claude Code or Codex just did. It summarizes the wall of text down to what matters, and your code never leaves your machine.

posts.name: wooflLogs
posts.tagline: a simple dog training companion app
posts.description: Most dog owners train, forget what happened, and repeat the same mistakes. woofLogs is a structured training log that shows you exactly what your dog has learned, what still needs work, and whether you're making progress. Log every session with skill tags, response ratings, and conditions. See trends over time. Track progress with the 3D method: Duration, Distance, Distraction. For owners who want results, and trainers who need visibility between appointments.

makers.name: Katarzyna Stachyra
makers.headline: Building playful training tools for dogs

posts.name: Sign PDF. Add real handwritten signature
posts.tagline: The only PDF signing tool for adding real signature to PDF
posts.description: Sign PDF - the only PDF signing tool, which provide you to add your real handwritten signature to PDF, not scribbles by mouse on the screen or fake signatures made by handwritten fonts.

posts.name: Chariot
posts.tagline: 5-minute Gita lessons for modern life
posts.description: Chariot helps you build clarity, emotional resilience, and better decision making through 5 minute daily lessons inspired by the Bhagavad Gita. Complex ideas are turned into simple explanations, practical examples, and short quizzes making timeless wisdom accessible without requiring any prior knowledge.

posts.name: Voca Vela
posts.tagline: Helps you adapt in a new country
posts.description: Moved to a new country and don't speak the language? Voca Vela translates live conversations both ways, so you and the person in front of you can just talk and hear the translation out loud. It also reads signs, menus, documents and labels through your camera, does quick text translations, and dubs video. There's a practice mode to rehearse a conversation before you have it, but the translation is what helps you from day one. Thirty nine languages, free to start.

posts.name: MockDPE: AI Built by Pilots, for Pilots
posts.tagline: Ace your FAA pilot checkride with a realistic AI examiner
posts.description: An FAA exam is the most important a pilot will ever take, costing $1000+ and going on their permanent record. MockDPE makes verbal practice possible through an AI DPE (examiner) using a custom aircraft, live weather, and real world conditions. MockDPE provides regulatory citations, grades with 96.3% consistency, and is validated by flight instructors. After each exam, you'll receive a breakdown against the FAA ACS so you know what to study. Test your IFR knowledge for free at https://mockdpe.org

posts.name: Alacrio
posts.tagline: Your AI chief of staff that acts before you ask
posts.description: Alacrio monitors your meetings, emails, and tasks — then speaks up at exactly the right moment with the action that matters. The proactive AI work companion. Start your 7-day free trial. Alacrio is an AI productivity assistant that watches your emails, meetings, and tasks — then surfaces what needs your attention and drafts what you'd say next. No prompts. No dashboards. Just proactive alerts that show up when it matters.

posts.name: CST+
posts.tagline: Run your own 24/7 TV and FAST channels, self-hosted
posts.description: CST+ is self-hosted software for running your own 24/7 linear TV and FAST channels. Point a channel at a folder of video, it renders once and broadcasts forever at near-zero CPU. Schedule mode, automatic EPG, server-side ads, and one-command install. Your server, no cloud fees.

posts.name: Sazu: AI Meal Prep & Tracker
posts.tagline: Meal prep, calorie tracking & budget in one app
posts.description: Sazu plans your whole week of meals around your budget, tracks your calories from a photo, and keeps you on track — with Mochi, your pixel-art cooking companion.

posts.name: Project Oryx
posts.tagline: Decompose. Visualize. Understand codebases, legacy to AI.
posts.description: Explore and execute code visually across Python, Java, and C++. Sequence diagrams light up in sync as the program steps, built deterministically from the AST and live execution, not an LLM’s guess. Variables render as structured visuals: trees, containers, pointer graphs. Rewind to any point, change a value, and continue down a new branch. From legacy systems to AI-generated code, every codebase becomes legible.

makers.name: Jonathan Castillo
makers.headline: Debugging silicon to servers, with AI.

posts.name: Circkit
posts.tagline: AI-powered film festival strategy for indie filmmakers
posts.description: Circkit is the AI-powered film festival strategist app. It scores the festivals that fit your film, protects your world premiere, and tracks BAFTA and Oscar routes. Private by design, your work is never sold.

posts.name: MIRA Dial
posts.tagline: A physical dial that blocks every screen at once.
posts.description: MIRA Dial is a physical dial that blocks distractions across all your screens. Turn it to start a focus session and everything locks instantly. Unlike app blockers, there's no "one more minute" button and no setting to quietly switch off. The only way out is to physically turn the dial back. It's the first focus device that works across every screen simultaneously and can't be disabled in a moment of weakness. Built for anyone who's tried every focus app and beaten them all.

posts.name: Word Aligner
posts.tagline: Free visual word-by-word alignment for any language pair
posts.description: Word Aligner helps language learners, teachers, and linguists see exactly why a translation says what it does. Stack a sentence over its translation, link matching words by clicking, and the connectors make reordering, dropped words, and splits obvious at a glance. Add a gloss tier for morpheme-by-morpheme notation, an IPA tier for pronunciation, and set fonts and text direction for each line. When the diagram is ready, export a clean PNG or SVG for slides and handouts, or share as a URL.

posts.name: Fixmind
posts.tagline: AI Coding Agents, Code Review Tool, Vibe Coding Tools
posts.description: Fixmind is a local-first MCP server that turns every AI bug fix into a lesson you actually remember. No cloud, no account.

posts.name: Attachment Style Test & Quiz
posts.tagline: Understand your attachment style and relationship patterns
posts.description: I built this after realizing I was anxiously attached while my partner was avoidant. Suddenly, the confusing push-and-pull in our relationship made sense. Attachment Style Test helps you discover your attachment style, understand your emotional triggers, and recognize the relationship patterns you keep repeating. Built from a personal experience, with one goal: helping people understand themselves better in love.

posts.name: AI Video Transition Prompts
posts.tagline: Turn a start and end frame into AI video transition prompt
posts.description: Seamless AI transitions are all over your feed, but pulling one off is hard: the prompt that morphs cleanly between two frames is what separates a smooth cut from a flickering mess, and most tools charge you or leave you guessing. This is free, and it writes that prompt for you. Upload a start frame and an end frame, and in about 30 seconds it builds a transition prompt that interpolates cleanly between them. Paste it into Seedance or any model that takes a start and end frame. Free, no signup.

posts.name: ChangeRadar
posts.tagline: Breaking-change alerts for your dependencies
posts.description: ChangeRadar tracks 176 popular libraries and alerts you, in plain English, when a release has breaking changes — before they break your build.

posts.name: Ori
posts.tagline: Oura That Talks To You
posts.description: At the end of the day, Ori listens — to your words and how your body's really doing — and writes you a letter back. The friend you never had. Free, private, for everyone.

posts.name: Trisynapse
posts.tagline: Turn your scattered sources into a digital brain
posts.description: Trisynapse is a local-first, BYOK AI research workspace. Turn scattered papers, PDFs, bookmarks, notes & videos into a private digital brain. The app auto-summarizes, maps concept graphs, and compiles sources into auto-updating wikis. Work seamlessly with a built-in split-view Browser, local retrieval Chat, AI Assistants, and infinite Canvas whiteboards for note-taking. 100% offline-first (except AI API calls) and private: your vault stays on your machine

makers.name: Shanmukh G
makers.headline: Building tools that make life easier

posts.name: udictio
posts.tagline: a social app shaped like a dictionary
posts.description: udictio is a social app shaped like a dictionary. every topic, a song, a movie, a person, a feeling like "loneliness" or "biggest regret", gets one page, and anyone can add their take to it. no feed, no follower counts, no algorithm deciding what you see. entries are chronological, voting just surfaces the standout ones, and vote counts are hidden so an entry stands on what it says. built it solo over two years. iOS for now. would love your honest take.

posts.name: Midbar
posts.tagline: Advanced hardware data vault
posts.description: Advanced hardware data vault designed to maximize the cost of unauthorized access to your data.

posts.name: ClearSpeed GPS
posts.tagline: Clean GPS speedometer for iPhone
posts.description: ClearSpeed GPS is a paid-once iPhone speedometer that opens to a large live GPS speed readout in MPH, KM/H, or knots. It includes GPS signal status, trip distance, elapsed time, max and average speed, one-tap reset, day/night display, HUD mirror mode, Battery Saver, and a keep-screen-awake option. No ads, subscriptions, in-app purchases, account, analytics SDKs, tracking, or location upload. Website: https://clearspeedgps.com/

posts.name: Coinask
posts.tagline: AI crypto assistant connecting all your exchanges.
posts.description: Coinask is an AI crypto assistant that helps you understand and manage your crypto portfolio. Connect your exchange accounts, track all your assets in one place, and get clear explanations about what’s happening in the market and how it affects your portfolio. Unlike traditional portfolio trackers, Coinask doesn’t just show data — it explains it. Ask questions and get personalized answers based on your holdings. Built for everyday users, Coinask turns crypto complexity into clarity.

posts.name: Parallèle Reader
posts.tagline: Read books in two languages, side by side, fully offline
posts.description: Parallèle is a bilingual ebook reader: the original text on one side, a clean translation beside it. Powered by Apple's on-device translation, it works fully offline — no accounts, no servers. Comes with 5 free classics, or import your own EPUBs and PDFs, plus vocabulary export and reading stats. No subscription: a 7-day free trial, then a one-time purchase.

posts.name: Arvo is the manager capability layer.
posts.tagline: Manager training that happens inside the actual work.
posts.description: Arvo is the manager capability layer that runs on real people and real work. Most first-time managers figure out the job in real time, while their best person is already interviewing. Arvo fixes that. Two loops, one product: an engagement loop gives the manager one specific action this cycle; a skills loop turns each member's real work into a development brief for the manager. Next cycle shows what worked. Gallup: 70% of team engagement comes down to the manager. Arvo is how yours get there.

makers.name: Eileen Zhang
makers.headline: Founder of Arvo, shaping meaningful work

posts.name: Aneirin
posts.tagline: Cut your Claude Code & Copilot token bill, losslessly
posts.description: Claude Code and GitHub Copilot resend your whole conversation every turn, including pages of the model's own old "thinking" and context repeated word-for-word. You're billed for all of it. Aneirin is a local proxy that strips the redundant, re-billed tokens before the request leaves your machine, losslessly: the model still gets everything it needs, your answers are identical, your bill drops. 100% local, zero telemetry, your prompts never leave. Free up to 5M optimized tokens a day, no account.

posts.name: ExodeUI
posts.tagline: The Three-Dimensional AI Motion Infrastructure
posts.description: Today we’re introducing Exode, the missing motion layer for the AI era. Right now, AI can build user interfaces, but they ship completely flat Exode changes this by combining design, animation, and logic into one seamless experience With Exode, you or your AI assistant can design beautiful, living interfaces with real physics and interactive states It drops effortlessly into your app across 8 platforms with zero handoff required

posts.name: NOXI
posts.tagline: Free AI that builds consulting-grade decks with sources
posts.description: Most AI tools make pretty slides with made-up numbers. NOXI is different: it researches your topic and cites sources right on the slide, so the data is verifiable, not invented. What stands out: — Consulting-grade structure (frameworks, charts, analytical layouts), not generic bullets — Edit every element by AI or by hand, export clean PowerPoint, no watermark — Full Arabic / RTL support — Completely free, with frontier AI models Built end-to-end by one founder.

posts.name: TeamDock
posts.tagline: Built for Coaches. Made for the Whole Team.
posts.description: TeamDock helps coaches run their team from one clean platform. Coaches can organize externally hosted game video, create timestamped Film Room notes, share feedback, manage schedules and roster information, post team updates, collect photos, recognize sponsors, track fundraising, run polls, and keep players and families connected through one branded team hub.

posts.name: Scorifya Controls
posts.tagline: Self-hosted SOC 2 readiness, $99/mo, RFC 3161 timestamps
posts.description: Self-hosted SOC 2 compliance for teams that can't justify Vanta's $10K-$15K/year. 33 automated checks across AWS, GitHub, GCP, Azure mapped to AICPA TSC 2017. 20 manual controls with evidence. RFC 3161 timestamps on every attestation (DigiCert, verifiable offline with OpenSSL). Deploys in one docker-compose. Flat tiers from $99/mo. First 25 buyers per tier get 20% off forever.

posts.name: VigilVault
posts.tagline: Site monitoring + a credential vault that outlives you
posts.description: VigilVault watches your websites, APIs and servers from four global regions and alerts you the moment they go down. But it also stores the logins and licence keys that run your business in an encrypted vault, with a legacy handover so a trusted person can recover access if you no longer can. Uptime monitoring and business continuity in one tool. Free tier that works and premium tiers from £5/mo. UK-built, GDPR-friendly.

makers.name: Tom Chubb
makers.headline: Founder of multiple businesses in UK.

posts.name: YourCloudGroup AI Model Manager
posts.tagline: Turn spreadsheets into AI business predictions.
posts.description: Turn your spreadsheet into AI-powered business predictions with a simple point-and-click platform. No coding or data scientist required.

makers.name: Melanie Jumaga
makers.headline: SaaS marketer and co founder data ai

posts.name: Luigi Tur
posts.tagline: Plan every detail. Import bookings. Give back.
posts.description: Luigi Tur is a premium trip planner for people who care about every detail. Build day-by-day itineraries, import bookings automatically by forwarding confirmation emails, invite friends to joint trips, split expenses, and track every country you've visited on a world map. All your vouchers and documents in one place, accessible from any device. Free to use — and instead of charging you, we invite you to donate to any non-profit of your choice.

makers.name: Laerte Andrade
makers.headline: What if your app asked you to donate?

posts.name: FERMIX
posts.tagline: Always on. Always yours. Your personal AI agent
posts.description: Fermix is not another assistant. It is an Elixir-native, open-source AI agent runtime that runs on your machine, learns your taste, uses sandboxed tools, runs scheduled jobs, supports voice and app channels, and spins up parallel subagents for heavier work. Bring your own model and keys, keep control locally, and let your computer do real work.

posts.name: ExodeUI
posts.tagline: The Three-Dimensional AI Motion Infrastructure
posts.description: Today we’re introducing Exode, the missing motion layer for the AI era. Right now, AI can build user interfaces, but they ship completely flat Exode changes this by combining design, animation, and logic into one seamless experience With Exode, you or your AI assistant can design beautiful, living interfaces with real physics and interactive states It drops effortlessly into your app across 8 platforms with zero handoff required

posts.name: udictio
posts.tagline: a social app shaped like a dictionary
posts.description: udictio is a social app shaped like a dictionary. every topic, a song, a movie, a person, a feeling like "loneliness" or "biggest regret", gets one page, and anyone can add their take to it. no feed, no follower counts, no algorithm deciding what you see. entries are chronological, voting just surfaces the standout ones, and vote counts are hidden so an entry stands on what it says. built it solo over two years. iOS for now. would love your honest take.

posts.name: NOXI
posts.tagline: Free AI that builds consulting-grade decks with sources
posts.description: Most AI tools make pretty slides with made-up numbers. NOXI is different: it researches your topic and cites sources right on the slide, so the data is verifiable, not invented. What stands out: — Consulting-grade structure (frameworks, charts, analytical layouts), not generic bullets — Edit every element by AI or by hand, export clean PowerPoint, no watermark — Full Arabic / RTL support — Completely free, with frontier AI models Built end-to-end by one founder.

posts.name: Luigi Tur
posts.tagline: Plan every detail. Import bookings. Give back.
posts.description: Luigi Tur is a premium trip planner for people who care about every detail. Build day-by-day itineraries, import bookings automatically by forwarding confirmation emails, invite friends to joint trips, split expenses, and track every country you've visited on a world map. All your vouchers and documents in one place, accessible from any device. Free to use — and instead of charging you, we invite you to donate to any non-profit of your choice.

makers.name: Laerte Andrade

posts.name: Qadence

posts.name: Scorifya Controls
posts.tagline: Self-hosted SOC 2 readiness, $99/mo, RFC 3161 timestamps
posts.description: Self-hosted SOC 2 compliance for teams that can't justify Vanta's $10K-$15K/year. 33 automated checks across AWS, GitHub, GCP, Azure mapped to AICPA TSC 2017. 20 manual controls with evidence. RFC 3161 timestamps on every attestation (DigiCert, verifiable offline with OpenSSL). Deploys in one docker-compose. Flat tiers from $99/mo. First 25 buyers per tier get 20% off forever.

posts.name: Aneirin
posts.tagline: Cut your Claude Code & Copilot token bill, losslessly
posts.description: Claude Code and GitHub Copilot resend your whole conversation every turn, including pages of the model's own old "thinking" and context repeated word-for-word. You're billed for all of it. Aneirin is a local proxy that strips the redundant, re-billed tokens before the request leaves your machine, losslessly: the model still gets everything it needs, your answers are identical, your bill drops. 100% local, zero telemetry, your prompts never leave. Free up to 5M optimized tokens a day, no account.

posts.name: Attachment Style Test & Quiz
posts.tagline: Understand your attachment style and relationship patterns
posts.description: I built this after realizing I was anxiously attached while my partner was avoidant. Suddenly, the confusing push-and-pull in our relationship made sense. Attachment Style Test helps you discover your attachment style, understand your emotional triggers, and recognize the relationship patterns you keep repeating. Built from a personal experience, with one goal: helping people understand themselves better in love.

posts.name: AgentRisk
posts.tagline: Scan untrusted AI-agent repos before your agent runs them
posts.description: AgentRisk is a zero-execution preflight scanner and local MCP server for AI-agent artifacts. Point it at a folder, GitHub URL, npm package, or tarball before your coding agent opens it. It flags risky MCP launchers, install scripts, secret-forwarding config, and repo instructions like "readenv" or "ignore approval". Use it from the CLI or as an MCP tool: npx --yes agentrisk@latest mcp config. Exports JSON, Markdown, SARIF, and terminal reports.
